582 SCTNG_DSCHRG_CD SCTNG_DSCHRG_CD Therapies: Suctioning (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving suctioning therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
